iterations.content:
Extract the two-panel layout (list + detail) from `inbox.vue` into a reusable `InboxView.vue` component. Accept an optional `laneId` prop to scope the view to a single lane.

**Rationale:** The lane detail page needs the same review experience as the global inbox. Extracting this avoids duplicating ~80 lines of template + keyboard handling logic.

**Changes:**
- New `components/InboxView.vue` with full inbox UI
- `pages/inbox.vue` simplified to `<InboxView />`
- `LaneInboxTab.vue` rewritten to `<InboxView :lane-id="laneId" />`
